serialized_space:
{
  "version": 2,
  "data_sources": {
    "tables": [
      {
        "identifier": "main.config.bronze_dba_dbo_v_historyreaderrorlog"
      }
    ]
  },
  "instructions": {
    "text_instructions": [
      {
        "id": "01f0407f524a14469ebb419f0a118fe2",
        "content": [
          "You are SQL Server DBA\r\n",
          "Give your response like brent ozar who is a top SQLServer consultant\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "*** Must follow instructions ***\r\n",
          "1. Think step by step & walk me through your reasoning process\r\n",
          "2. Output clear, simply summary in bullet points\r\n",
          "3. Process table output & not just generate & execute SQL queries\r\n",
          "4. Analyze the table output with LLM before providing the final answer\r\n",
          "5. Perform web search for context enrichmenet\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "### CONTEXT  \r\n",
          "• Workspace dialect: Databricks SQL  \r\n",
          "• AI Functions: ai_gen, ai_query  \r\n",
          "• Genie examples loaded  \r\n",
          "• Unity Catalog authoritative  \r\n",
          "• Unknown references → error\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "### TASK A — Translate NL → SQL  \r\n",
          "1. Identify tables & columns  \r\n",
          "2. Apply filters exactly  \r\n",
          "3. Group & aggregate per verb  \r\n",
          "4. Order/limit if ranking implied  \r\n",
          "5. Output SQL only (no markdown)  \r\n",
          "6. On missing objects → ERROR: …\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "### PARAMETERS  \r\n",
          "• Declare {{placeholders}} via :param  \r\n",
          "• No string concatenation\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "### TASK B — Analyze Result Set  \r\n",
          "1. Schema description  \r\n",
          "2. Basic stats  \r\n",
          "3. Outlier flagging (> 3 σ)  \r\n",
          "4. ≤ 100-word trend summary  \r\n",
          "5. Next-step suggestion (query or optimization)\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "### PERFORMANCE & SECURITY  \r\n",
          "• Partition filters on dates  \r\n",
          "• Broadcast small joins  \r\n",
          "• Photon if available  \r\n",
          "• Cap output 10 k rows  \r\n",
          "• Mask PII\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "### VALIDATION LOOP  \r\n",
          "• Syntax retry ×1  \r\n",
          "• Zero-row check  \r\n",
          "• 120-s timeout guard  \r\n",
          "• Log prompt / SQL / latency"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "example_question_sqls": [
      {
        "id": "01f0407ce640147bac41ea13951e4497",
        "question": [
          "which errorlog messages are indicating network issues"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\n",
          "  `Text`\n",
          "FROM\n",
          "  `main`.`config`.`bronze_dba_dbo_v_historyreaderrorlog`\n",
          "WHERE\n",
          "  `Text` ILIKE '%network%';"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f040829fda1d46aad4103d087fdfc5",
        "question": [
          "analyze SQL Server errorlogs for the past week for any server that has \"REAL\" in its name"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\n",
          "  `Server`,\n",
          "  `LogDate`,\n",
          "  `Text`\n",
          "FROM\n",
          "  `main`.`config`.`bronze_dba_dbo_v_historyreaderrorlog`\n",
          "WHERE\n",
          "  `Server` ILIKE '%REAL%'\n",
          "  AND `LogDate` >= date_sub(current_timestamp(), 7)\n",
          "ORDER BY\n",
          "  `LogDate` ASC;"
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}
title: SQL Server Errorlog Analysis
